4. What command or series of steps does the user follow to make this change?
• Answer: Set the ingressRequestRateLimiterEnabled server parameter to true, and the
ingressRequestAdmissionRatePerSec and ingressRequestAdmissionBurstCapacitySecs to
the desired values. The user should ensure that each member of each replica set has
ingressRequestRateLimiterExemptions to include other members of the set (this parameter
accepts the same format of values as the existing maxIncomingConnectionsOverride
parameter). The user can add other exemptions for any clients that should not be subject to
rate limiting.
